member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.FuseBurnMaskTestInstanceResults
member.summary: Class to allow proper user modification of exit port.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.FuseBurnMaskTestInstanceResults.FunctionalResult
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether functional execution passes or fails.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.FuseBurnMaskTestInstanceResults.ExecuteRegisterHandle
member.summary: Gets or sets register handle.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.IFuseBurnMaskExtensions
member.summary: Interface for extending FuseBurnMask Test Method.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.IFuseBurnMaskExtensions.GetDynamicPinMask
member.summary: Gets the list of pins to mask execution after execution. The test method will merge this list with the ones from the test instance parameter.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.IFuseBurnMaskExtensions.CreateTestInstanceResults
member.summary: Called prior to any test in Execute to generate the test instance results object.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.IFuseBurnMaskExtensions.CustomExecute(Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.FuseBurnMaskTestInstanceResults)
member.summary: This function provide user the ability to customize execute mask.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.IMaskRegisterHandle
member.summary: Fuse burn handle interface for configuration file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.IMaskRegisterHandle.DatalogFormat
member.summary: Gets or sets datalogFormat.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.IMaskRegisterHandle.BurnPatternConfig
member.summary: Gets or sets BurnPatternConfig.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.IMaskRegisterHandle.RegisterName
member.summary: Gets register name.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.IMaskRegisterHandle.DataLabelName
member.summary: Gets data label name.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.IMaskRegisterHandle.DataLabelOffset
member.summary: Gets data label offset.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.IMaskRegisterHandle.ModifyPins
member.summary: Gets modify pins.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.IMaskRegisterHandle.RetrieveFuseStringValueFromFuseRead
member.summary: Gets fuseString value from fuseRead that store with default sharedstorage key. If user defined sharedstorage key, then get fusestring with the provided key.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.IMaskRegisterHandle.GetFinalFuseStringToBurn
member.summary: Post process fuse string before execute burn.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.IMaskRegisterHandle.GetFuseStringToDatalog(System.String@)
member.summary: Gets fuse string to datalog.
member.param: Fuse String value to be printed.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.IMaskRegisterHandle.ExecuteMask(System.String)
member.summary: Execute static and dynamic mask.
member.param: Name of the mask to apply.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.MaskRegisterHandle.DynamicChar
member.summary: Character use by dynamic mask indicate modify bits.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.MaskRegisterHandle.ConsolePaddingSizeForFuseString
member.summary: Standard padding size to print fuse string for better presentation at console.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.MaskRegisterHandle.configurationName
member.summary: Configuration to be processed.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.MaskRegisterHandle.registerName
member.summary: Register name to be processed.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.MaskRegisterHandle.register
member.summary: Register object that store all register related data for current instance.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.MaskRegisterHandle.fuseGroupAddressList
member.summary: Store required addresses which need to be extract, in order to match fuseGroup defined in static/dynamic mask. eg: 0-1, 4-8.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.MaskRegisterHandle.fuseBurnDataToMaskOffIndexList
member.summary: Store index to mask off fuseBurnData. eg: 5, 8, 10, 12.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.MaskRegisterHandle.isPrimeDebugEnabled
member.summary: True when user set test instance parameter log level to Enabled. This will print more information to console.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.MaskRegisterHandle.fusestringSharedStorageKey
member.summary: Sharedstorage key to get fusestring. If empty, default key will be fusestring_registername.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.MaskRegisterHandle.fuseReadFuseString
member.summary: Gets fuseString from fuseRead. It is arranged from MSB->LSB.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.MaskRegisterHandle.maskToApply
member.summary: Mask to apply based on current register handle.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.MaskRegisterHandle.fuseBurnData
member.summary: Store fuse burn data after mask execution. It is arrange from MSB->LSB.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.MaskRegisterHandle.fuseBurnDataToConsole
member.summary: Store fuse burn data when fuseGroupToHide is enable. FuseBurnDataToConsole will be printed to console and ituff, instead of original fuseBurnData.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.MaskRegisterHandle.postMaskFuseComposite
member.summary: Post mask off composite string to be printed on console.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.MaskRegisterHandle.#ctor(Prime.BusinessLogic.FuseLogicCollection.FuseBurn.Configurations.FuseBurnJsonFile,System.String,System.String,System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Sharedstorage key to get fusestring. If empty, default key will be fusestring_{registername}.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.MaskRegisterHandle.DatalogFormat
member.summary: Gets or sets DatalogFormat.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.MaskRegisterHandle.BurnPatternConfig
member.summary: Gets or sets BurnPatternConfig data.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.MaskRegisterHandle.GetMaskByName(System.String)
member.summary: Get User Execute Mask Information.
member.returns: Mask is found and its information.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.MaskRegisterHandle.GetFuseGroupDynamicValue(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.BusinessLogic.FuseLogicCollection.FuseBasic.Configurations.Dynamic})
member.summary: Function to acquire Mask value based on fuseGroup specified in json file, before replacing the dynamic value. The sequence is bottom up of Mask value and replace the character from LHS to RHS.
member.param: Mask list of dynamics data object.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.MaskRegisterHandle.ReplaceDynamicValue(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Replace MaskString that contain 'm' with Dynamic Mask Value.
member.param: Dynamic Mask value get from sharedstorage, dff or uservar. Expect only '0' and '1'.
member.returns: Mask String that only contain '0' and '1', where 'm' is replaced with Dynamic Mask value.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.MaskRegisterHandle.BuildFuseGroupFuseBurnData(System.String)
member.summary: Replacing fuseBurnData using mask value, fuse by fuse.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.MaskRegisterHandle.ConstructInternalMaskFromBurnRange
member.summary: BurnRange function populate '0' according to register size. '0' will change to '1' (called internal mask) following burnRange defined by user in json file.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.MaskRegisterHandle.PerformBitwise(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Perform and-bitwise according to fullString and fuseGroup type.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.MaskRegisterHandle.FinalizeFuseBurnDataWithMaskValue(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Update fuseBurnData by override fuseRead fuseString with mask value for static and dynamic mask, given if burnRange is disabled. If burnRange is enable, bitwise value will replace as composite value. Bit that contains 's' or are not replaced/override by mask value will remain using 's' as skip, which form FUSE BURN DATA.
member.param: FullString or fuse group mask value that intends to override fuseRead fuseString.
FullString or fuse group bitwise value, form by burn range value.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.MaskRegisterHandle.MaskOffMaskValue(System.String)
member.summary: Post process maskFuse for console output, include fuseGroup and fullString case.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.MaskRegisterHandle.UpdateFuseBurnData(System.String)
member.summary: Update global fuseBurnData.
member.param: Input value to override into fuseBurnData. eg: mask value.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.PrimeFuseBurnMaskTestMethod
member.summary: Dummy description of this test method.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.PrimeFuseBurnMaskTestMethod.listOfFuseBurnHandles
member.summary: Dictionary that contain fuse burn register handle (tie to Configuration name and Register name) and its pat config handle.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.PrimeFuseBurnMaskTestMethod.funcTest
member.summary: Functional test to execute.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.PrimeFuseBurnMaskTestMethod.userInputMaskPins
member.summary: List of pins to mask.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.PrimeFuseBurnMaskTestMethod.EnabledDisabledMode
member.summary: Settings to enable or disable.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.PrimeFuseBurnMaskTestMethod.EnabledDisabledMode.ENABLED
member.summary: Enable/True. This will skip execute pattern (functional test).

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.PrimeFuseBurnMaskTestMethod.EnabledDisabledMode.DISABLED
member.summary: Disable/False. This will execute pattern (functional test).

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.PrimeFuseBurnMaskTestMethod.ConfigurationFile
member.summary: Gets or sets ConfigurationFile. "~HDMT_TPL_DIR/Modules/FuseBurn/FuseBurn/InputFiles/fuseBurnScenario1.json". other using type String.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.PrimeFuseBurnMaskTestMethod.VoltageFile
member.summary: Gets or sets VoltageFile. "~HDMT_TPL_DIR/Modules/FuseBurn/FuseBurn/InputFiles/fuseBurnVoltage.json". other using type String.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.PrimeFuseBurnMaskTestMethod.ConfigName
member.summary: Gets or sets the configuration name for the input file. Can only define single name.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.PrimeFuseBurnMaskTestMethod.RegisterNames
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of registers to select within the configuration. Can define single or multiple name with comma delimiter.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.PrimeFuseBurnMaskTestMethod.SharedStorageKeyToRead
member.summary: Gets or sets comma separated sharedstorage key name to get fusestring per register. The number of SharedStorageKeyToRead must be match the number of RegisterNames.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.PrimeFuseBurnMaskTestMethod.MaskNames
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of masks to select within the register. By default the test method only allow define single mask name, but user can use it as CommaSeparatedString to run multiple mask with CustomExecute.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.PrimeFuseBurnMaskTestMethod.Patlist
member.summary: Gets or sets Patlist to execute.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.PrimeFuseBurnMaskTestMethod.PrePatlist
member.summary: Gets or sets Pre Patlist to execute.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.PrimeFuseBurnMaskTestMethod.TimingsTc
member.summary: Gets or sets TimingsTc for plist execution.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.PrimeFuseBurnMaskTestMethod.LevelsTc
member.summary: Gets or sets LevelsTc for plist execution.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.PrimeFuseBurnMaskTestMethod.Prime#TestMethods#CommonParams#IApplyEndSequenceParameter#ApplyEndSequence
member.summary: Gets or sets the ApplyEndSequence at the end of the test.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.PrimeFuseBurnMaskTestMethod.MaskPins
member.summary: Gets or sets comma separated pins for mask.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.PrimeFuseBurnMaskTestMethod.MaxNumberOfFails
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum number of failure to capture.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.PrimeFuseBurnMaskTestMethod.SkipPatternExecute
member.summary: Gets or sets to Execute Pattern aka Run Functional Test. Set DISABLED for execute pattern (functional test).

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.PrimeFuseBurnMaskTestMethod.FuseBurnConfigJson
member.summary: Gets or sets the FuseBurnJsonFile file data contents.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.PrimeFuseBurnMaskTestMethod.FuseBurnVoltageConfigJson
member.summary: Gets or sets the FuseBurnVoltageJsonFile file data contents.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.PrimeFuseBurnMaskTestMethod.SetPinMask
member.summary: Set the list of pins that will be masked when plist is executed.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.FuseBurnSspecTestInstanceResults
member.summary: Class to allow proper user modification of exit port.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.FuseBurnSspecTestInstanceResults.FunctionalResult
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether functional execution passes or fails.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.FuseBurnSspecTestInstanceResults.ExecuteRegisterHandle
member.summary: Gets or sets register handle.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.IFuseBurnSspecExtensions
member.summary: Interface for extending FuseBurnSspec Test Method.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.IFuseBurnSspecExtensions.CreateTestInstanceResults
member.summary: Called prior to any test in Execute to generate the test instance results object.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.IFuseBurnSspecExtensions.CustomExecute(Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.FuseBurnSspecTestInstanceResults)
member.summary: This function provide user the ability to customize execute mask.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.ISspecRegisterHandle
member.summary: Fuse burn handle interface for configuration file.

member.summary: Gets or sets datalogFormat.

member.summary: Gets or sets BurnPatternConfig.

member.summary: Gets register name.

member.summary: Post process fuse string before execute burn.

member.summary: Gets fuse string to datalog.

member.summary: Execute static and dynamic Sspec.

member.summary: Gets or sets ConfigurationFile name. "~HDMT_TPL_DIR/Modules/FuseBurn/FuseBurn/InputFiles/fuseBurnScenario1.json". other using type String.

member.summary: Gets or sets the configuration name for the input file. Can only define single name.

member.summary: Gets or sets the name of registers to select within the configuration. Can define single or multiple name with comma delimiter.

member.summary: Character use by dynamic mask indicate modify bits.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.SspecRegisterHandle.SSPECUservar
member.summary: Uservar which contains SSPEC name.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.SspecRegisterHandle.ConsolePaddingSizeForFuseString
member.summary: Standard padding size to print fuse string for better presentation at console.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.SspecRegisterHandle.configurationName
member.summary: Configuration to be processed.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.SspecRegisterHandle.registerName
member.summary: Register name to be processed.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.SspecRegisterHandle.register
member.summary: Register object that store all register related data for current instance.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.SspecRegisterHandle.fuseGroupAddressList
member.summary: Store required addresses which need to be extract, in order to match fuseGroup defined in static/dynamic mask. eg: 0-1, 4-8.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.SspecRegisterHandle.fuseBurnDataToMaskOffIndexList
member.summary: Store index to mask off fuseBurnData. eg: 5, 8, 10, 12.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.SspecRegisterHandle.dynamicSspecFuseGroup
member.summary: Store list of dynamic fusegroup for Sspec.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.SspecRegisterHandle.isPrimeDebugEnabled
member.summary: True when user set test instance parameter log level to Enabled. This will print more information to console.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.SspecRegisterHandle.fusestringSharedStorageKey
member.summary: Sharedstorage key to get fusestring. If empty, default key will be fusestring_registername.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.SspecRegisterHandle.fuseReadFuseString
member.summary: Gets fuseString from fuseRead. It is arranged from MSB->LSB.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.SspecRegisterHandle.sspecValue
member.summary: Gets sspec string value from FuseDbService.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.SspecRegisterHandle.sspecToApply
member.summary: Sspec to apply based on current register handle.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.SspecRegisterHandle.fuseBurnData
member.summary: Store fuse burn data after mask execution. It is arrange from MSB->LSB.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.SspecRegisterHandle.fuseBurnDataToConsole
member.summary: Store fuse burn data when fuseGroupToHide is enable. FuseBurnDataToConsole will be printed to console and ituff, instead of original fuseBurnData.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.SspecRegisterHandle.postMaskFuseComposite
member.summary: Post mask off composite string to be printed on console.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.SspecRegisterHandle.#ctor(Prime.BusinessLogic.FuseLogicCollection.FuseBurn.Configurations.FuseBurnJsonFile,System.String,System.String,System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Sharedstorage key to get fusestring. If empty, default key will be fusestring_{registername}.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.SspecRegisterHandle.DatalogFormat
member.summary: Gets or sets DatalogFormat.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.SspecRegisterHandle.BurnPatternConfig
member.summary: Gets or sets BurnPatternConfig data.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.SspecRegisterHandle.PerformBitwise(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Perform and-bitwise according to fullString and fuseGroup type.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.SspecRegisterHandle.GetSspec
member.summary: Get User Execute SSPEC Information.
member.returns: Sspec is found and its information.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.SspecRegisterHandle.GetSspecDynamicFuseGroup
member.summary: Get User Execute SSPEC Dynamic FuseGroup Information.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.SspecRegisterHandle.GetFuseGroupDynamicValue(System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.BusinessLogic.FuseLogicCollection.FuseBasic.Configurations.Dynamic})
member.summary: Function to acquire Mask value based on fuseGroup specified in json file, before replacing the dynamic value. The sequence is bottom up of Mask value and replace the character from LHS to RHS.
member.param: Mask list of dynamics data object.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.SspecRegisterHandle.ReplaceDynamicValue(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Replace MaskString that contain 'm' with Dynamic Mask Value.
member.param: Dynamic Mask value get from sharedstorage, dff or uservar. Expect only '0' and '1'.
member.returns: Mask String that only contain '0' and '1', where 'm' is replaced with Dynamic Mask value.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.SspecRegisterHandle.ConstructInternalMaskFromBurnRange
member.summary: BurnRange function populate '0' according to register size. '0' will change to '1' (called internal mask) following burnRange defined by user in json file.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.SspecRegisterHandle.FinalizeFuseBurnDataWithMaskValue(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Update fuseBurnData by override fuseRead fuseString with mask value for static and dynamic mask, given if burnRange is disabled. If burnRange is enable, bitwise value will replace as composite value. Bit that contains 's' or are not replaced/override by mask value will remain using 's' as skip, which form FUSE BURN DATA.
member.param: FullString or fuse group mask value that intends to override fuseRead fuseString.
FullString or fuse group bitwise value, form by burn range value.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.SspecRegisterHandle.MaskOffMaskValue(System.String)
member.summary: Post process maskFuse for console output, include fuseGroup and fullString case.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FuseBurn.SspecRegisterHandle.UpdateFuseBurnData(System.String)
member.summary: Update global fuseBurnData.
member.param: Input value to override into fuseBurnData. eg: mask value.
